title: System Architecture
description: Frontend, backend, databases, APIs, and how requests flow
longDescription: Every app you use has invisible plumbing behind the scenes. When you tap a button, a chain of events happens: your browser sends a request, a server processes it, a database stores or retrieves data, and a response comes back. This course reveals that hidden machinery. You'll understand how frontends and backends work together, what APIs actually are, how data flows through a system, and how to design apps that don't fall apart as they grow.
